_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: p16INK4a (p16) was upregulated with increasing passage, while RB1 phosphorylation at S807/811, sites of CDK4/6 phosphorylation, was reduced. A concomitant induction of senescence-associated β-galactosidase (SA-βgal) was also observed
details: p16INK4a upregulated with increasing passage while RB1 phosphorylation at S807/811 was reduced, with concomitant induction of senescence-associated β-galactosidase
